title: Jan 15 self-reflection — too much on the plate, the Travis Boersma strat
html:
Stream-of-consciousness HS-junior journal: Yahir feeling drowned by everything on his plate (school, FBLA, dad stuff, internships) and concluding that the move is to focus narrowly on a few things and excel — explicitly naming the Travis Boersma strategy.

TL;DR

  • "Too much shit will drown you, but being able to shift between things is vital for success" — proto-version of scenario thinking.
  • Decision crystallized: focus narrowly, Travis Boersma-style — the founder he'd shadow nine months later at Dutch Bros.
  • January 2020, pre-COVID, junior year overload — same month as the FBLA/Chinese-recording NYE seed.

travis boersma · dutch bros · fbla · grants pass high school · scenario thinking
